name: llm-wiki
description: Build a personal Markdown wiki that Claude maintains for you. Implements Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern as a Claude Code plugin: drop sources into a folder, Claude reads and writes structured cross-linked Markdown pages, you read in Obsidian.
longDescription: Personal knowledge bases usually fail on maintenance, not intent. Someone has to update cross-references, fix stale summaries, merge overlapping pages, and keep citations aligned with source material. LLM Wiki offloads that editing work to Claude. You curate sources and ask questions; Claude maintains pages, links, and the cross-cutting synthesis. Includes /wiki-init for bootstrapping new vaults with five built-in scenarios (research, reading, personal, business, general), /wiki-ingest with built-in PDF/DOCX/PPTX/XLSX extraction and idempotency cache, /wiki-query with optional qmd hybrid-search, /wiki-lint for health checks, and cross-vault query for working across multiple wikis.
